caption:
5 calls you're losing every week without realising — and how to catch every one.

The on-the-tools call. The 9pm emergency. The "I'll ring back" that never comes. The
double-booked Monday. The lunchtime quote-chaser ringing round three trades.

You don't need more leads. You need to stop losing the ones you've got.

How many are you losing? Free audit — link in bio. 👇 Save + send to a mate on the tools.

#plumber #electrician #heatingengineer #tradestips #missedcalls
